title: LOVE BOX PROGRAM - 211info
text: SALEM ANGELS LOVE BOX PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Fosters a supportive community for foster families. This includes caregivers, children in foster care, and any biological or adopted children living in the home. Volunteers or groups are matched with local foster families based on compatibility and location. Monthly visits provide support for the parents and a sense of normalcy, stability, and confidence for the children. 3340 Commercial Street SE Suite 110 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Resource parents with at least one foster child in the home Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 877-6806 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 877-6806 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties Services: Personal/Grooming Supplies * Foster Children Shoes * Foster Children * Foster Children Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - DARE TO DREAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALEM ANGELS
